name: Alchemist
description: Masters of the formula book who create bombs, elixirs, and mutagens through advanced alchemy.

name: Barbarian
description: Powerful warriors who channel primal rage to enhance their combat abilities and shrug off injury.

name: Bard
description: Performers and magical historians who use occult magic drawn from the power of art and emotion.

name: Champion
description: Holy warriors bound to a divine cause, protecting allies and smiting foes with divine power.

name: Cleric
description: Divine spellcasters and healers devoted to a deity, channeling divine power through prayer.

name: Druid
description: Primal spellcasters who draw power from nature, able to wildshape and command natural forces.

name: Fighter
description: Consummate warriors who master every type of weapon and armor through rigorous training.

name: Investigator
description: Skilled detectives who combine alchemical knowledge and sharp minds to uncover the truth.

name: Magus
description: Hybrid martial-arcane warriors who channel arcane power directly into their strikes.

name: Monk
description: Disciplined martial artists who train body and spirit, using unarmed strikes and ki abilities.

name: Oracle
description: Mysterious divine spellcasters who channel divine power through a cursed mystery beyond their control.

name: Psychic
description: Occult spellcasters who manifest power through the strength of their subconscious mind.

name: Ranger
description: Skilled hunters who track prey, form bonds with animal companions, and master the wilderness.

name: Rogue
description: Cunning and adaptable, rogues use finesse and wit to outmaneuver enemies and seize the advantage.

name: Sorcerer
description: Innate spellcasters who draw power from their bloodline, casting spells of their chosen tradition.

name: Summoner
description: Spellcasters bonded to a powerful eidolon, sharing their power and actions across two bodies.

name: Swashbuckler
description: Dashing combatants who use panache and flair to gain advantages and finish fights in style.

name: Thaumaturge
description: Arcane theorists who exploit the weaknesses of supernatural creatures using esoterica and implements.

name: Witch
description: Mysterious spellcasters who forge a pact with a magical patron, gaining spells through their familiar.

name: Wizard
description: Scholarly arcane spellcasters who learn magic through intense study and a spell book.
